_publications._publicationTitle: Multidimensional Immunotyping of Human NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumors Uncovers Tumor-Associated Macrophages as Key Drivers of Immune Evasion in the Tumor Microenvironment.

_contextSnippet: We did not observe a significant difference in CSF1R expression between PN, ANNUBP, and MPNST, although there were a number of malignant specimens with high CSF1R expression
details: Successfully detected CSF1R expression on M2-like macrophages with high expression and intertumoral heterogeneity; no significant difference between PN, ANNUBP, and MPNST by IHC
